steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to explain what Psydrax odorata is. The notes identify it as a flowering shrub and as one of the native species on Oahu, Hawaii. The correct choice must define the plant itself, not describe what was done with it.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'In a 2019 study, researchers catalogued seeds from Psydrax odorata.': focuses on what researchers did with the seeds, not on what the plant is. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Psydrax odorata is a flowering shrub species that is native to Oahu, Hawaii.': directly defines the plant using both key details from the notes. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Most plant species found in Oahu, Hawaii, like Hedychium gardnerianum, are non-native.': discusses non-native species, not Psydrax odorata specifically. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Seeds from Psydrax odorata were found by researchers in the feces of non-native birds.': again focuses on what was done with the seeds rather than defining the plant. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
